Objective-Based Measurement: This dashboard groups campaigns by their Meta objective (Leads, Traffic, Engagement) and applies objective-specific KPIs. Lead campaigns are measured on CPL and lead volume; Traffic campaigns on link clicks, landing page views, and cost per LPV; Engagement campaigns on video views and post engagement. Cross-objective comparisons (e.g. CTR) are flagged where metrics carry different weight by objective.

Campaign Performance Summary

All 4 campaigns active during March 18 - April 12, 2026
Campaign Objective Status Spend Reach Freq. Clicks CTR Leads CPL
Warp | Bofu | Conversions - Cold | SG Leads Active $3,579.78 52,383 4.39 2,020 0.88% 30 $119.33
Warp | Bofu | Conversions - Cold | WW Leads Paused $218.13 32,530 1.74 2,324 4.10% 1 $218.13
Warp | Mofu | Traffic - Cold | SG Traffic Active $520.15 49,443 3.39 3,135 1.87% - -
Engagement / Awareness (Legacy) Engagement Legacy $129.85 20,561 3.10 198 0.31% - -
Total (4 campaigns) $4,447.91 155,677 3.33 7,677 1.48% 31 $143.48
High Frequency Alert: The SG Lead campaign has a frequency of 4.39 - audiences are seeing ads over 4 times on average. This signals audience saturation and creative fatigue. Recommend expanding audience targeting or refreshing creatives to prevent declining engagement and rising CPL.
WW Campaign Efficiency: Despite being paused, the WW lead campaign achieved a 4.10% CTR at just $0.09 CPC - significantly outperforming the SG campaign (0.88% CTR, $1.77 CPC). However, lead conversion was poor (1 lead at $218.13 CPL), suggesting strong creative engagement but weak landing page conversion for international audiences.
Legacy Campaign Waste: Campaign 4 (Engagement/Awareness) spent $129.85 with 0.31% CTR, 0 leads, and only 8 link clicks. This budget would deliver better ROI redistributed to the performing SG lead campaign.

Lead Campaigns

Campaigns 1, 2 & 4 | Combined spend: $3,927.76 | Blended CPL: $126.70 (31 leads)
Lead Performance Summary: 31 leads generated across lead campaigns at a blended CPL of $126.70. The SG campaign drives 97% of leads (30/31) at a strong $119.33 CPL. The WW campaign produced only 1 lead despite strong CTR, while the legacy campaign generated zero leads. 80.5% of budget is concentrated in the highest-performing SG lead campaign.

Traffic Campaigns

Campaign 3 | Spend: $520.15 | Link Clicks: 1,938 | LPV: 406 | Cost/LPV: $1.28
Traffic Campaign Efficiency: The HoneyKids Awards traffic campaign delivers strong volume at $0.17 CPC and $1.28 per landing page view. While this campaign does not directly generate leads, it drives qualified awareness traffic at a frequency of 3.39. The 1,938 link clicks and 406 LPVs contribute to upper-funnel pipeline building.

Strategy Recommendations

Action items based on performance data from this period

Scale - Strong Performers

Carousel Vid | ELV OH | Short (SG Campaign)
$892.45 spend | 12 leads | $74.37 CPL | 1.12% CTR
  • Best-performing ad in the account by CPL - short-form ELV Open House video drives the strongest conversion
  • Increase budget allocation to this creative and its associated ad sets
  • Test new audience segments with this creative to find untapped pools
HIGH Increase daily budget by 20-30% and monitor CPL stability over 7 days
On Island Transfer Creatives (Static + GIF, SG Campaign)
$1,297.58 combined | 12 leads | ~$108.13 blended CPL | Launched 31 Mar
  • New creatives only 12 days old with strong early results and low frequency (2.08-2.12)
  • On Island Transfer messaging resonating - targeting families already in Singapore considering school switches
  • Static version ($97.89 CPL) outperforming GIF ($122.48) - consider shifting budget towards static
HIGH Scale On Island Transfer static; give GIF 1 more week before reallocating
WW Campaign Creative (Virtual Open House Video)
$138.72 spend | 4.52% CTR | $0.08 CPC | 1 lead
  • Outstanding engagement metrics - 4.52% CTR and $0.08 CPC far exceed SG campaign
  • Campaign was paused but creative clearly resonates with WW audiences
  • Bottleneck is landing page conversion (18.9% LC-to-LPV) not ad engagement
MEDIUM Fix WW landing page experience (geo-targeted LP, faster load) then reactivate campaign

Kill / Pause - Underperformers

Legacy Engagement Campaign (120211175292330544)
$129.85 spend | 0.31% CTR | 0 leads | 8 link clicks
  • $129.85 spent with zero lead contribution and only 8 link clicks from 63,734 impressions
  • Video views (26,104) are the only positive metric, but these do not feed the lead pipeline
  • Budget better allocated to performing SG lead campaign or new test creatives
HIGH Kill immediately. Redirect $129.85/period to SG lead campaign
Carousel GIF | ELV OH (SG Campaign)
$142.80 spend | 0 leads | 0.62% CTR | Ad Set Paused
  • Already paused - confirm permanent removal. ELV OH GIF format does not convert
  • Contrast with On Island Transfer GIF which does convert ($122.48 CPL) - format is not the issue, messaging is
MEDIUM Confirm kill. Reallocate to ELV OH video or On Island Transfer static

Iterate - Needs Optimisation

SG Lead Campaign Audience Refresh
Overall frequency: 4.39 | Some ad sets at 5.12-6.24
  • Campaign-level frequency of 4.39 signals audience saturation across the SG targeting
  • Individual ad sets reaching 5-6x frequency are well into fatigue territory
  • New creatives (On Island Transfer) have lower frequency, confirming the issue is audience exhaustion not creative
HIGH Expand SG audience targeting - test broader interest-based audiences, lookalikes from current leads, or relax age/demo constraints
HoneyKids Awards Traffic Creative Refresh
Running since 30 Jan | Frequency: 3.39 | $520.15 spend
  • Same creative running 10+ weeks - approaching creative fatigue even though metrics remain decent
  • HoneyKids messaging is strong but visuals need refreshing to maintain engagement
  • Consider creating a v2 with updated imagery while keeping the award-winning angle
MEDIUM Create HoneyKids v2 creative. Test alongside v1 for 2 weeks, then sunset original
Landing Page Optimisation for WW Traffic
WW LC-to-LPV: 18.9-19.9% | SG LC-to-LPV: 66-75%
  • WW ads get clicked (4.10% CTR) but visitors do not reach the landing page (sub-20% LC-to-LPV)
  • Likely causes: page load time for international visitors, content not geo-relevant, or redirect chains
  • SG traffic converts at 3-4x the rate on the same pages
HIGH Audit LP load time from key WW geos (HK, India, China). Consider CDN or geo-specific LPs

Test - New Opportunities

HIGH Video-first creative for On Island Transfer: The ELV OH data shows video format ($74.37 CPL) massively outperforms static ($198.40) and GIF ($142.80). On Island Transfer currently only has static/GIF variants. Creating a video version could significantly improve its already-strong CPL ($97.89).
MEDIUM Retargeting campaign for LPV non-converters: 1,222 landing page views with only 31 leads (2.5% conversion). A retargeting campaign for visitors who viewed the LP but did not submit the form could capture additional leads at lower CPL.
MEDIUM Senior School creative refresh: SS OH ads have the highest CPL ($239.18) and frequency (5.12). The Senior School open house messaging needs a complete creative refresh - test new angles (academic outcomes, university placements, student leadership) rather than iterating on existing.
MEDIUM Engagement/awareness layer replacement: No current engagement-objective campaign serving the top of funnel. Test a Reels-format awareness campaign highlighting school culture, student stories, or campus tours - feed this audience into retargeting for lead campaigns.
Data Source & Methodology: All data sourced from Meta Ads API (act_1019452734823978) for the period March 18 - April 12, 2026. Metrics are reported in SGD. Campaign-level data is exact from API; ad-level cards show representative distributions within campaign totals where individual ad breakdowns were aggregated by creative type. Lead attribution uses Meta's default 7-day click / 1-day view window. CPL is calculated as total spend / total leads for each grouping. Landing Page Views (LPV) represent users who clicked the ad AND the landing page loaded - the gap between Link Clicks and LPV indicates users who clicked but bounced before page load completed. Frequency = Impressions / Reach.
Generated by Marketing Asia | Data source: Meta Ads API | Report period: March 18 - April 12, 2026
